<DESCRIPTION>Halpha velocity field parameters (Table 3) and photometric data and inverse Tully-Fisher inclinations (Table 4)</DESCRIPTION>
<!-- +++No column could be found to attach a LINK in table: J/ApJS/276/59/sample -->
<FIELD name="_RAJ2000" ucd="pos.eq.ra" ref="J2000" datatype="double" width="11" precision="7" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_RA" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Right ascension (FK5, Equinox=J2000.0) at Epoch=J2000. (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_DEJ2000" ucd="pos.eq.dec" ref="J2000" datatype="double" width="11" precision="7" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_DEC" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Declination (FK5, Equinox=J2000.0) at Epoch=J2000. (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<DESCRIPTION>Number of Halpha measurements for this galaxy (link to Table 7)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="sigMod" ucd="stat.error" datatype="float" width="4" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="inc" ucd="src.orbital.inclination" datatype="float" width="4" precision="1" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_INCLIN_LOS" -->

<FIELD name="phi0" ucd="pos.posAng" datatype="float" width="5" precision="1" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_POS-ANG" -->
<DESCRIPTION>[8/374.1] Position angle of the major axis, {phi}_0_</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="e_phi0" ucd="stat.error;pos.posAng" datatype="float" width="4" precision="1" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="Vrot" ucd="phys.veloc.rotat" datatype="float" width="5" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="VELOC_ROTAT" -->
<FIELD name="e_Vrot" ucd="stat.error;phys.veloc.rotat" datatype="float" width="4" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="hrot" ucd="instr.scale" datatype="float" width="4" precision="1" unit="arcsec"><!-- ucd="INST_SCALE" -->
<FIELD name="e_hrot" ucd="stat.error;instr.scale" datatype="float" width="4" precision="1" unit="arcsec"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="Vsys" ucd="phys.veloc" datatype="float" width="7" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="VELOC_SYST_HC" -->
<FIELD name="e_Vsys" ucd="stat.error;phys.veloc" datatype="float" width="4" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="Aphi" ucd="src.morph.param" datatype="float" width="6" precision="3"><!-- ucd="MORPH_ASYMMETRY" -->
<DESCRIPTION>[0.015/0.4] Asymetry measure, A_{phi}_, defined in Section 5.3</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="Arc" ucd="src.morph.param" datatype="float" width="6" precision="3"><!-- ucd="MORPH_ASYMMETRY" -->
<DESCRIPTION>[0.016/0.8]? Asymmetry measure, A_RC_, defined in Section 5.3</DESCRIPTION>
